---
title: 'Walmart!'
date: '2010-05-21T00:57:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2243460523528677706'
blogger_filename: '/2010/05/walmart.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

God had Walmart send $5 gift cards. Then everyone in the building didn't actually read the add. So we have nearly $100 in Walmart Gift Cards to spend. Flavia gave me one and I realized: God Provided lunch through an unual and outside means. GO GOD! Harvest is coming in!<br />
<br />
dw
